title: The Return of Peter Grimm
writer: David Belasco, Bradley King, Helen Klumph
actors: Alec B. Francis, John Roche, Janet Gaynor
plot: The fondest wish of Peter Grimm, elderly patriarch of a famous tulip growing family, is that his ward Kate will marry his nephew and primary heir, Fredrick. Though she loves another, she agrees to marry Fredrick. When Grimm dies, ...
